en: All the Stars from Black Panther. Music by Kendrick Lamar, Mark Soundwave Spears and Anthony Top Dog Tiffith. Lyric by Kendrick Lamar, SZA and Anthony Top Dog Tiffith.
I'll Fight from RBG. Music and lyric by Diane Warren. The Place Where Lost Things Go from Mary Poppins Returns. Music by Mark Shaman. Lyric by Scott Whitman and Mark Shaman.
Shallow from A Star is Born. Music and lyric by Lady Gaga, Mark Ronson, Anthony Rosamondo and Andrew Wyatt.
When a Cowboy Trades His Spurs for Wings from The Ballad of Buster Scruggs. Music and lyric by Gillian Welch and David Rollins.
ko: 카우보이가 날개를 위해 스퍼를 바꿀 때.
